div.head: 273. Editorial Note
div.p: On May 13 Herman Phleger delivered an address before the American Branch of the International Law Association in New York City entitled “Recent Developments Affecting the Regime of the High Seas.” Among the matters discussed by Phleger were freedom of the seas, conservation of fishery resources, and the Continental Shelf. The text of the address is printed in Department of State Bulletin, June 6, 1955, pages 934-940.
